official_title: Format for providing public comments to DIFCA on Consultation paper No. 3 of 2025 Proposed Amendments to the Real Property Law DIFC Law No. 10 of 2018 and Real Property Regulations
official_title_normalized: format for providing public comments to difca on consultation paper no 3 of 2025 proposed amendments to the real property law difc law no 10 of 2018 and real property regulations
short_title:
Annex C Format for providing public comments to DIFCA on Consultation paper No. 3 of 2025 Proposed Amendments to the Real Property Law ote 1: DIFCA reserves the right to publish, including on its website, any comments you provide. However, if you wish to remain anonymous, you must expressly equest at the time of making comments that this should be the case Note 2: The column titled ‘comments on proposed policy’ relates to the policy explained in the Consultation Paper (“CP”). The column titled ‘comments on proposed legislation’ refers to the draft legislation reflecting the proposed policy Note 3: It is possible that you may not have any comments, either on the proposed policy or legislation, or may have comments on one and not the other. You may leave a blank column if you either agree to the proposed position, or you have no concerns relating it Note 4: If there are any ambiguities relating to the proposed policy or legislation, you may raise those in your comments
Name of individual / entity providing comments:
Nlo Comments on nronoced nolicvComments on nronoced leaiclation
General Waiver for the Regictrar of Real Dronerty
Do you agree that the RORP should have this general waiver? Are there any conditions that you think should apply to the RORP’s general er of waiver? Please provide details 1 2018
